fusion_size_estimate.method: 3-way inclusion-exclusion over pair estimates: E=E12+E13+E23-2*E123, with E123 estimated from per-dataset overlap probabilities; singleton-aware projection applied for final fused output (include_singletons=True assumption)

singleton_assumption.notes: Conservative singleton-aware estimate: each expected matched cluster reduces the final row count by at least one.

blocking.reasoning: Estimate is moderately off; candidate generation and matching quality likely explain the gap. Blocking estimate was conservative; downstream matching/fusion retained more entities than expected.

reasons: Strong evidence of list/scalar/stringified-list inconsistencies, especially for genres, with 19 normalization-sensitive mismatches reported.
Author also shows mixed list-like and text encodings, including multi-contributor strings and role suffixes versus canonical single-author text.
Language has evidence of multi-valued fused strings like 'english, german' versus validation-style scalar values, so scalar text canonicalization is needed.
Publisher/title mismatches include canonicalization-sensitive variants such as shortened imprints, abbreviations, punctuation, and whitespace/token differences.
No case-only mismatch pattern is present, so blanket lowercasing is not supported.
No country canonicalization evidence is present; country normalization is not indicated.
normalization_directives.recommendation_summary: Rerun normalization focused on validation-compatible list and text canonicalization: normalize genres and author as list-like fields, flatten stringified list artifacts, clean author role/multi-contributor text, and canonicalize scalar language plus publisher/title whitespace and variant forms. Do not add country normalization or blanket lowercasing.

findings.title: No case-only mismatch pattern detected

findings.title: No country canonicalization issue detected
